scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @warswarm/server" "npm run dev -w @warswarm/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @warswarm/shared && npm run build -w @warswarm/server && npm run build -w @warswarm/client
scripts.host: npm run build && npm run start -w @warswarm/server
scripts.host:internet: concurrently -k -n host,tunnel -c blue,magenta "npm run host" "ngrok http 2567 --log stdout"
